Date Posted:
We help the world run better


At SAP, we keep it simple: you bring your best to us, and we'll bring out the best in you. What you'll build

 

Position title: Working Student (f/m/d) - User Experience Design for AI at Customer Experience & Solutions (CXS)

Work Area: Software-User Experience

Location: St. Leon Rot

Expected start date: 1st March 2025

 

In this role, you’ll:

Gain first-hand insights into the diverse role of UX designers at SAP, learning about different workflows, methods, and collaboration models across teams
Work closely with the CXS UX team in their day-to-day work and contributing to shared project goals
Contribute to impactful UX projects at the intersection of user experience, technology, and AI
Collaborate on emerging AI-driven use cases, exploring new interaction paradigms and helping shape the future of UX
Gain hands-on experience by applying your theoretical knowledge in real-world settings while learning from experienced UX professionals who value mentoring and knowledge sharing
Learn and apply best practices in UX design, absorb established design standards, and continuously develop your skills within a collaborative and supportive design culture

 

What you bring 

 

You are a student (f/m/d) at a university or a university of applied sciences. We’re looking for someone who takes initiative, perseveres, and stays curious. You like to work on meaningful innovative projects and are energized by lifelong learning.

 

Strong interest in AI-based products and current technological trends
Familiar with user-centered design and interaction design
Basic understanding of UX design concepts, techniques, and design tools is a plus
Eager to learn about the latest trends and developments in UX design
Demonstrates strong analytical and problem-solving skills, capable of identifying pain points and devising innovative solutions to enhance user satisfaction
A team player with excellent communication and presentation skills
Proficient in analyzing user feedback and open to discussing solutions and improvements with experts
Willingness to work mostly onsite in St. Leon-Rot
Fluent in German and English

 

Where you belong

 

The User Experience (UX) team at CXS is focused on designing and creating engaging, intuitive, and effective digital experiences for customers. As a critical part of the broader Customer Experience (CX) department, the UX team works to empathetically understand and address user needs, leveraging cutting-edge technology and data-driven insights to enhance user interactions across digital platforms. The team's interdisciplinary approach combines expertise in design, psychology, and technology, fostering an environment of innovation and collaboration.

 

Envisioning to “Delight customers. Always.”, the Customer eXperience & Solutions (CXS) teams within the Customer Support organization engineer software products in the area of Application Lifecycle Management (ALM) that helps to create the perfect experience throughout the customer journey, from discovery & implementation to go-live, for all SAP products.

 

Your set of application documents should contain a cover letter, a resume in table form, school leaving certificates, certificate of enrollment, current university transcript of records, copies of any academic degrees already earned, and if available, references from former employers (including internships). Please also describe your experience and skills in foreign languages and leveraging state of the art software.

 

This is a SAP global, strategic, paid working student position that provides students with opportunities to find purpose in their careers.

What you´ll build


Position title: Working Student (f/m/d) – Sales Development & Demand Generation (SAP Customer Experience)
Work Area: Sales
Location: Berlin (2 days per week on-site)
Expected start date: as soon as possible
Duration: +12 months

In this role, you’ll:

Drive outbound demand generation campaigns for our SAP Customer Experience (CX) Partner-Led Territory (PLT) team in the Swiss and Austrian market
Plan and execute multi-channel outreach – email, LinkedIn and phone, in close collaboration with & and Marketing
Research and qualify target accounts and decision-makers across Manufacturing, Retail and Consumer Products industries
Prepare pitch decks, customer-facing collateral and campaign assets
Keep CRM data clean & run sequences in Outreach; track and report on campaign performance
Take ownership of your own campaigns, test what works, and iterate together with the team


What you bring 

 

Student (f/m/d) at a university or university of applied sciences
Preferred fields of study: Business Administration, Marketing, Sales Management, Communications, Business Informatics or comparable
Computer skills / tools: confident with Microsoft Office (especially PowerPoint and Excel); first exposure to SAP, Outreach, LinkedIn Sales Navigator & MS Office is a plus
Language skills: German mother tongue (written and verbal – essential for the DACH market) and fluent in English
Soft skills: proactive and self-organized, curious mindset, strong communicator, team player who enjoys picking up the phone and engaging with customers
Nice to have: first experience in sales, marketing, sales development or any customer-facing role
At least 2 semesters of studies until graduation are required
Working from the Berlin office is required approx. 2 days per week.


Where you belong


You’ll join SAP Customer Experience (CX) – our portfolio around commerce, sales, service, marketing and customer data solutions that helps companies build lasting customer relationships. Within SAP CX you’ll sit inside the Partner-Led Territory (PLT) sales team for Switzerland and Austria, winning new customers together with our partner ecosystem.

 

Our mission: grow SAP CX in the German mid-market by combining SAP’s category-leading technology with the hands-on expertise of our partners. Day to day, we run outbound demand generation campaigns, qualify opportunities, host joint events with partners, and collaborate closely with Marketing, Solution Advisory and Partner Management.

 

You’ll work alongside experienced sales professionals, get early exposure to enterprise B2B SaaS, and own campaigns and accounts from day one. It’s not just selling software – it’s about trust, transforming businesses and helping the world run better.

Position title: SAP iXp Intern (f/m/d) – Regional Account Based Marketing (MEE)

Location: Walldorf/München, DE

Start date: 1st August 2026

 

In this role, you’ll: 

Support regional marketing campaigns aligning with local and regional Marketeers and other business units
Collaborate in the organization of events, participate in trade fairs/exhibitions
Report and analyze different campaigns
Cost controlling, reporting and project follow-up
Coordinate with agencies as well as internal and external service providers
Collaborate in the execution of innovative projects within (digital) marketing
Research and administrate activities
Build and maintain asset databases and campaign websites 

 

What You’ll Bring  

 

We’re looking for someone who takes the initiative, perseveres, and stays curious. You like to work on meaningful innovative projects and are energized by lifelong learning.  

 

You are a student (f/m/d) at a university or a university of applied sciences. We’re looking for someone who takes initiative, perseveres, and stays curious. You like to work on meaningful innovative projects and are energized by lifelong learning.

 

Student (f/m/d) at a university or a university of applied sciences

You are extremely self-motivated and always up for a good challenge to solve together with the team
You find motivation and satisfaction in developing creative ideas while adhering to a brand and comms framework

Conceptual and analytical thinking are among your strengths
You can work independently, but enjoy the spirit and added value trusting teamwork brings

Where You Belong 

 

Be part of SAP Next Gen, a global community for students, universities, schools and educational partners, who are passionate about innovation and technology. 

 

Culture of Collaboration: Partner with experienced SAP colleagues and expert mentors who will support your growth. Grow professionally through personalized mentoring, coaching, and career development support. 


Project-driven Experience: Kickstart your career with hands-on learning experience, making an impact from day one by contributing to meaningful projects that help the world run better.  You’ll have endless learning resources at your fingertips and gain future-ready skills from a variety of virtual, in-person, and hybrid learning sessions, cultivated just for you, and aligned with our learning approach.


Gain Visibility: Build relationships with leaders and peers across teams and functions. Showcase your ideas, skills, and creativity in a global, fast-paced environment. Open doors for future career opportunities within SAP and beyond. 

 

As an Intern (f/m/d) you support the regional marketing team for Account Based Marketing being responsible for MEE (Middel Eastern Europe, consisting of Germany, Switzerland and CEE countries). Regional marketing supports Sales and local Marketing teams by positioning SAP as an innovative solution provider for an intelligent enterprise and a reliable business partner in the market. As Regional Marketing for Account Based Marketing, we create, develop and execute marketing campaigns for strategic customers such as BMW, Bosch or Daimler Truck in very close alignment with internal and external stakeholders. Projects are challenging but very fun and rewarding, In cooperation with other Marketing Teams, you will implement successful strategic marketing campaigns using push- and pull-activities, physical and digital tactics to drive business and strategic trends as the digital transformation of an enterprise.

Position title: Working Student (f/m/d) – Experience Center Walldorf Storytelling, Documentation & Design


Work Area: Marketing


Location: Walldorf


Expected start date: June 2026

 

You face an exciting work environment at the SAP Experience Center Walldorf and be part of our extensive student community. We are looking for a creative, self-driven and motivated working student (f/m/d) who has a passion for storytelling, visual communication, and content creation.

Support the creation and maintenance of compelling narratives and storylines for customer visits and executive experiences
Develop and refine documentation such as tour scripts, briefing materials, and process guides
Create visually engaging presentations, graphics, and design assets for Experience Center activities
Contribute to the visual identity and design consistency of Experience Center materials

Join our team and start an exciting career at SAP – while you are still studying. You'll get great training on the job with plenty of learning opportunities and create a strong network within SAP and beyond.


What you bring

 

You are a student (f/m/d) at a university or a university of applied sciences. We're looking for someone who is creative, detail-oriented, and takes initiative.

 

The job is for you if you are / have:

Strong written communication skills with an eye for storytelling and narrative structure
Proficiency in design tools (e.g., Figma, PowerPoint)
Basic technical skills
Strong communication skills (fluent in German and English)
A creative mindset with attention to visual aesthetics and brand consistency
Good organizational skills and attention to detail
Proactive, self-driven, and comfortable working independently
A team player with openness to feedback and collaboration
Studies in Information Systems, Communication, Marketing, or a related field are an advantage
Working regularly from the office in Walldorf is required


Where you belong

 

Experience Centers are innovation hubs delivering an interactive and immersive experience to visitors. SAP Experience Centers make SAP's brand, products and innovations tangible and deliver a memorable customer experience.


Our team is responsible for the content delivery across all SAP's Experience Centers globally. In your role you would support the creation of content for topics around Digital Manufacturing and Process Industry content. 


Within this team, the storytelling and design function ensures that every customer interaction is supported by high-quality narratives, documentation, and visual materials that bring SAP's value proposition to life.
